title: client.rs txid validation accepts uppercase but doc says lowercase
description: client.rs txid validation uses is_ascii_hexdigit() which accepts A-F (uppercase) and a-f (lowercase). The comment says txids are lowercase per spec. A test named parse_send_response_uppercase_hex_is_accepted explicitly documents this permissive behavior. The inconsistency is between the comment (says lowercase) and the implementation (accepts both). Either enforce lowercase with a targeted check (lowercasing the txid before validation, or rejecting uppercase) or update the comment to say the validator accepts any hex case. No security consequence — txids are public.
